zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges於1152年出生在法國時，他的父親comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges33歲，母親Laurence de TOULOUSE23歲。他和Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre至少有1個女兒。他去世於1225年2月22日在法國豪-加洛希特加貝勒享年73歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges于1152年出生在法国时，他的父亲comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges33岁，母亲Laurence de TOULOUSE23岁。他和Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre至少有1个女儿。他去世于1225年2月22日在法国豪-加洛希特加貝勒享年73岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comminges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges was born in 1152, in France, his father, comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges, was 33 and his mother, Laurence de TOULOUSE, was 23. He had at least 1 daughter with Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. He died on 22 February 1225, in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges est né en 1152, à France, son père, comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Laurence de TOULOUSE, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. Il est décédé le 22 février 1225, à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges 1152 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges 33 und seine Mutter Laurence de TOULOUSE 23. Er hatte mit Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1225 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges è nato il nel 1152 nel Francia, il suo padre, comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Laurence de TOULOUSE, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. Morì il 22 febbraio 1225, nel Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Bernard  IV De Commingesが1152年にフランスで生まれた時，父comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Commingesは33歳，母Laurence de TOULOUSEは23歳であった。彼はComtesse Stéphanie de Bigorreとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1225年2月22日にフランスハウテ-ガーオンシンテガベルで73歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges(이)가 1152년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Laurence de TOULOUSE(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1225년 2월 22일 프랑스 하테-가니 신테가벨에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges nasceu em 1152, em França, seu pai, comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Laurence de TOULOUSE, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1225, em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, França, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges родился в 1152 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Laurence de TOULOUSE, 23. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. Он умер 22 февраля 1225 г. в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges nació en 1152, en Francia, su papá, comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Laurence de TOULOUSE, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Comtesse Stéphanie de Bigorre. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1225, en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
